source: Synthetic — campground confirmation in an August 2026 weekend; daySchedule represents an empty (or unrelated-day) calendar view. Models the typical 1-6 month lead time for camping reservations.

input.subject: Your Hillsborough River State Park reservation is confirmed
input.bodyTruncated:
Hello Rebekah,

Your camping reservation at Hillsborough River State Park is confirmed.

Check-in: Friday, August 14, 2026 at 3:00 PM
Check-out: Sunday, August 16, 2026 at 1:00 PM
Site: Tent Site 47
Confirmation #: HR-2026-88234

We look forward to your visit. Please review our cancellation policy at the link below.

ReserveAmerica

notes: Tests the >14-day-out CREATE path. The candidate is in mid-August; the daySchedule contains only late-May events. findIntervalOverlaps returns [] -> arbiter never called -> deterministic CREATE. Phase 9 would also have CREATEd this (no title sim hit), but Phase 11 makes the no-overlap branch explicit and free. The daySchedule here intentionally contains real-looking unrelated events (not an empty array) to confirm the overlap check is the gate, not the schedule's size.
